meaning: n.[矿]石膏,[农]石膏肥料vt.施石膏肥料于,用石膏处理
examples: As we know, gypsum is soluble in water.
You'll find lots of gypsum deposited at Lechuguilla.
If there were flowing water in the cave, it would dissolve the gypsum.
And it was actually was built on a top of gypsum which dissolves in water.
This is the world's largest cement company, second-largest concrete firm and third-largest gypsum wallboard maker.
